description: Gold examples manifest for chelinh-studio-v2.jsx — parsed from Style_Thinking_Patterns_v13.md. Maps 61 patterns across 10 styles to reference image URLs for --sref + ready-to-use prompts with --no negatives.

parts: 1. Medium/Format — render type (Cinematic 3D render, 2D cartoon illustration, etc.)
3. Positioning/Negative Space — frame position + UI overlay space
6. Color Palette — with HEX when needed

style_01_ai3d_historical.name: AI 3D Render Historical
style_01_ai3d_historical.ai_render_principle: Mannequin không mặt + bối cảnh hyper-detailed. Chia 2 grading: COOL desaturated (war/spy/outdoor) vs WARM tungsten (interior/document). Luôn chừa chỗ cho location card/subtitle overlay.

gold_examples.name: mannequin
gold_examples.description: Mannequin face character (smooth blank egg-head) + period uniform + cinematic environment
gold_examples.prompt: Cinematic 3D render, mannequin character with smooth blank featureless egg-shape head wearing period-accurate 1940s civilian coat, walking away, leaving bottom space empty for subtitles, foggy European village street, motivated dramatic single-source lighting, desaturated cool blue-grey palette, volumetric atmospheric haze, subtle film grain --no human face, eyes, mouth, flat 2D, neon
gold_examples.negative_prompt: human face, eyes, mouth, flat 2D, neon

gold_examples.name: archival_reveal
gold_examples.description: Cross-dissolve từ mannequin sang B&W archival photo thật của nhân vật lịch sử
gold_examples.prompt: Archival 1940s B&W photography, portrait of a female WWII spy, centered composition, historical military uniform, natural studio lighting, warm sepia tint overlay, heavy film grain, authentic historical scratch texture --no modern clothing, 3D render, color
gold_examples.negative_prompt: modern clothing, 3D render, color

gold_examples.name: document
gold_examples.description: Document close-up với AI-mangled gibberish text + tungsten amber lighting
gold_examples.prompt: Cinematic macro 3D render, white gloved hands holding an old vintage ID card with AI-mangled gibberish text and red wax seal, leaving frame corners empty, resting on a dark wooden desk, warm tungsten amber lighting, rich brown and cream palette, vignette edges, paper texture --no real human hands, modern UI, clear readable English text
gold_examples.negative_prompt: real human hands, modern UI, clear readable English text

gold_examples.name: locationcard
gold_examples.description: Aerial drone + giant bold YELLOW CAPS place name + small white date line
gold_examples.prompt: Cinematic aerial drone shot, dense misty forest with tall pine trees, leaving large central negative space for giant typography overlay, wide landscape, moody overcast lighting, cool desaturated slate grey and dark green palette, heavy volumetric fog --no characters, flat vectors, bright sunlight
gold_examples.negative_prompt: characters, flat vectors, bright sunlight

gold_examples.name: blueprint
gold_examples.description: Technical 3D tactical terrain map sepia warm (NOT dark teal grid — Word doc was idealized)
gold_examples.prompt: Technical 3D engineering diagram, a vintage radio transmission coil rendered in 3D floating in center, leaving wide empty spaces around for dashed line text callouts, flat conceptual environment, flat lighting, monochromatic dark teal (#1E3A4A) palette, blueprint grid lines texture --no photorealistic background, warm colors, human figures
gold_examples.negative_prompt: photorealistic background, warm colors, human figures

gold_examples.name: date_stamp_pill
gold_examples.description: Small dark pill chip bottom-right + white sans-serif date — chronology marker
gold_examples.prompt: Cinematic 3D render, extreme wide shot of a snowy trench, leaving bottom right corner completely dark and empty for UI pill overlay, battlefield environment, overcast dramatic lighting, cool winter blue palette, film grain --no text, no bright corners
gold_examples.negative_prompt: text, no bright corners

gold_examples.name: engineering_diagram
gold_examples.description: Blueprint mode: dark teal grid BG + 3D rendered device + dashed callout CAPS labels
gold_examples.prompt: Technical 3D engineering diagram, a vintage radio transmission coil rendered in 3D floating in center, leaving wide empty spaces around for dashed line text callouts, flat conceptual environment, flat lighting, monochromatic dark teal (#1E3A4A) palette, blueprint grid lines texture --no photorealistic background, warm colors, human figures
gold_examples.negative_prompt: photorealistic background, warm colors, human figures

style_02_cinematic_realism.name: Cinematic Realism
style_02_cinematic_realism.ai_render_principle: Letterbox 2.35:1 liên tục, macro shot đồ vật THẬT, shallow DoF, sepia/teal grading. Không illustration phẳng. Camera move thay cut.

gold_examples.name: letterbox_macro_stat
gold_examples.description: Macro $1 bill engraving sepia warm + dark red Trajan serif '78%' + small caps subtitle
gold_examples.prompt: Cinematic macro photography, extreme close-up of a 100 US dollar bill focusing on the engraved texture, shallow depth of field, leaving left side blurred and empty for bold red typography overlay, dark isolated background, single-source dramatic lighting, sepia-warm gold palette, heavy film grain, 2.35:1 aspect ratio aesthetic --no modern digital charts, flat graphics, full room visible
gold_examples.negative_prompt: modern digital charts, flat graphics, full room visible

gold_examples.name: document_annotation
gold_examples.description: Article zoom + yellow highlighter + red hand-drawn oval + italic citation
gold_examples.prompt: Cinematic macro photography, a printed financial newsletter paper on a dark wooden desk, slightly blurred edges with shallow DoF, leaving room for digital yellow highlights, dark environment, side-angled moody lighting, cool teal and stark white paper palette, natural paper grain --no digital pure white background, human faces
gold_examples.negative_prompt: digital pure white background, human faces

gold_examples.name: definition_card
gold_examples.description: Trajan distressed CAPS + yellow highlighter underline + pocket-watch illustration mask
gold_examples.prompt: Minimalist texture background, highly detailed vintage cream textured paper with a subtle vertical torn edge revealing pure black darkness on the right half, flat surface, dim atmospheric lighting, cream and deep black palette, raw paper fiber texture --no text, objects, modern ui
gold_examples.negative_prompt: text, objects, modern ui

gold_examples.name: host_moody
gold_examples.description: Dark home office + orange ring lamp single source + T-Rex skull prop + dark T-shirt
gold_examples.prompt: Cinematic portrait photography, medium close-up of a male host in a dark t-shirt sitting in a dark home office, looking serious, pure black background, dramatic single-source side lighting with a subtle orange ring lamp accent, moody dark aesthetic, fine film grain, 2.35:1 aspect ratio feel --no bright daylight, clean white studio, cheerful expression
gold_examples.negative_prompt: bright daylight, clean white studio, cheerful expression

gold_examples.name: crt_archival
gold_examples.description: B&W vintage period film framed 4:3 inside 2.35:1 letterbox + film aging + sepia
gold_examples.prompt: Live-action cinematic shot, a physical retro CRT television sitting on a dark wooden table with a blurred vase of flowers in the background, screen is glowing white leaving space for footage composite, dark room environment, practical lighting from the TV screen, moody teal shadows, VHS scanline subtle texture on the glass --no flat digital borders, modern monitors
gold_examples.negative_prompt: flat digital borders, modern monitors

style_03_editorial_minimal_lemmino.name: Editorial Minimal (LEMMiNO)
style_03_editorial_minimal_lemmino.ai_render_principle: Bảng màu rất hạn chế (đen/xám/trắng + ĐIỂM NHẤN ĐỎ). 3 lớp abstraction: wireframe → diorama → B&W photo. Negative space cực lớn cho monospace text/labels.

gold_examples.name: scale_model_diorama
gold_examples.description: White/grey miniature buildings on lit white surface + investigator's table aesthetic
gold_examples.prompt: 3D scale model diorama, miniature monochromatic grey buildings of a 1970s airport sitting on a warm wooden investigator desk, empty black void background, dramatic spotlight on the diorama, dark cool navy and greyscale palette, subtle tilt-shift lens effect --no realistic humans, vibrant colors, flat vector art
gold_examples.negative_prompt: realistic humans, vibrant colors, flat vector art

gold_examples.name: torn_paper_dossier
gold_examples.description: Side-by-side torn-paper portrait cards + white glow + red handshake icon centered
gold_examples.prompt: Dark documentary aesthetic, a vintage B&W suspect mugshot photograph framed inside organic white torn-paper edges, resting on a pure black (#0A0A0A) background, leaving right side empty for monospace text overlay, soft ambient glow, greyscale with bright white paper accents, subtle film grain --no clean rectangular frames, modern UI, bright colored photos
gold_examples.negative_prompt: clean rectangular frames, modern UI, bright colored photos

gold_examples.name: red_silhouette
gold_examples.description: Top-down scale model cutaway + TWO red filled silhouette figures (faceless)
gold_examples.prompt: Editorial minimal 3D wireframe scene, a pure RED (#FF0000) filled silhouette of a man standing in a white-outline wireframe room, pure black (#0A0A0A) empty background leaving massive negative space for testimony text, minimal lighting, stark black/white/red restricted palette, slight chromatic aberration edge glow --no detailed faces, textures, full color gradients
gold_examples.negative_prompt: detailed faces, textures, full color gradients

gold_examples.name: monospace_testimony
gold_examples.description: Torn-paper portrait card + monospace pull quote with curly quotes + B&W mugshot
gold_examples.prompt: Editorial minimal 3D wireframe scene, a pure RED (#FF0000) filled silhouette of a man standing in a white-outline wireframe room, pure black (#0A0A0A) empty background leaving massive negative space for testimony text, minimal lighting, stark black/white/red restricted palette, slight chromatic aberration edge glow --no detailed faces, textures, full color gradients
gold_examples.negative_prompt: detailed faces, textures, full color gradients

gold_examples.name: timeline_ruler
gold_examples.description: Horizontal red timeline ruler + red dots + sightings/dates labels (Ripper-specific)
gold_examples.prompt: Victorian-period cartography top-down map, extruded 3D grey buildings from a 2D dark map, leaving space for red X markers and labels, dark void environment, minimal flat lighting, dark blue-grey desaturated palette, subtle film grain --no modern Google maps, bright colors, realistic trees
gold_examples.negative_prompt: modern Google maps, bright colors, realistic trees

style_04_vox_explainer.name: Vox Explainer
style_04_vox_explainer.ai_render_principle: Illustration PHẲNG monochromatic, KHÔNG 3D. Background grid notebook paper hoặc cream nhạt. Yellow highlighter là điểm nhấn duy nhất. Chừa massive negative space cho serif typography.

gold_examples.name: article_citation_headline
gold_examples.description: AP Supreme Court headline + body excerpt + ALL CAPS source brand stamp
gold_examples.prompt: Stylized journalism background, flat off-white canvas with subtle grid notebook paper texture in the corners, massive empty central negative space for bold serif text overlays, flat lighting, clean off-white and faded gray palette, clean vector-like smoothness --no 3D, shadows, photorealism, gradients
gold_examples.negative_prompt: 3D, shadows, photorealism, gradients

gold_examples.name: chapter_divider_numbered
gold_examples.description: Numbered chapter marker on cream paper + 'THE BELLWETHER' serif title
gold_examples.prompt: Stylized journalism background, flat off-white canvas with subtle grid notebook paper texture in the corners, massive empty central negative space for bold serif text overlays, flat lighting, clean off-white and faded gray palette, clean vector-like smoothness --no 3D, shadows, photorealism, gradients
gold_examples.negative_prompt: 3D, shadows, photorealism, gradients

gold_examples.name: chart_animated_reveal
gold_examples.description: Line chart on white BG + animated reveal + multi-color series
gold_examples.prompt: Editorial infographic background, a clean isometric grid of hundreds of small empty squares on a flat background, leaving room for yellow highlighter overlays, flat environment, no shading, off-white and faded grey palette, crisp vector edges --no 3D pop-out, text, organic shapes
gold_examples.negative_prompt: 3D pop-out, text, organic shapes

gold_examples.name: data_viz_grid_cells
gold_examples.description: Grid cells colored by year/county + 'Michigan election winners' header
gold_examples.prompt: Editorial infographic background, a clean isometric grid of hundreds of small empty squares on a flat background, leaving room for yellow highlighter overlays, flat environment, no shading, off-white and faded grey palette, crisp vector edges --no 3D pop-out, text, organic shapes
gold_examples.negative_prompt: 3D pop-out, text, organic shapes

gold_examples.name: map_highlighter
gold_examples.description: US state outline + Michigan highlighter yellow + small flag icons
gold_examples.prompt: Flat monochromatic digital cartography, a loose collage map of the US 50 states detached slightly, leaving top left corner empty, flat environment, flat lighting, pure navy blue outlines with light blue fill, subtle print paper grain --no realistic terrain, 3D globes, gradients
gold_examples.negative_prompt: realistic terrain, 3D globes, gradients

gold_examples.name: mono_flat_illustration
gold_examples.description: Single color flat house illustration on cream BG + $ minimal accent
gold_examples.prompt: Monochromatic flat 2D illustration, a simplified stylized icon of a house sitting on a stack of money bills, centered on canvas leaving room for citation brackets, flat void environment, zero shadows, single color dark green and off-white palette, clean crisp vector shapes --no 3D, outlines, realistic textures, photorealism
gold_examples.negative_prompt: 3D, outlines, realistic textures, photorealism

style_05_ted_cartoon_outline.name: TED-Ed Cartoon Outline
style_05_ted_cartoon_outline.ai_render_principle: Hoạt hình PHẲNG outline mực đen dày, màu solid tươi sáng. Big-head body simplified geometric. Background đổi solid saturated MỖI scene (pink/peach/mint).

gold_examples.name: character_pedestal_comparison
gold_examples.description: 3 outline characters on stacked pedestals (heights différents) + flat color BG
gold_examples.prompt: 2D cartoon illustration, two big-head characters with simplified geometric bodies standing on separate mountain peaks made of gold coins, wide shot, flat solid peach (#F5DCC1) background, flat unshaded lighting, highly saturated bright flat colors (pink, yellow, green) with thick black ink outlines, clean solid fill texture --no gradients, watercolor, photorealism, 3D depth, realistic human proportions
gold_examples.negative_prompt: gradients, watercolor, photorealism, 3D depth, realistic human proportions

gold_examples.name: country_flag_map_card_grid
gold_examples.description: 4-card grid: France flag + map + symbol icons + caps label
gold_examples.prompt: 2D stylized illustration, three light blue polaroid frames laid out side-by-side containing simplified country map outlines, sitting on a notebook ruled-paper background with binder ring holes on the left, flat lighting, mint green and bright red flat palette, thick black outlines --no text numbers (leave empty for code), 3D shadows, realistic paper
gold_examples.negative_prompt: text numbers (leave empty for code), 3D shadows, realistic paper

gold_examples.name: notebook_paper_chart
gold_examples.description: Notebook paper texture + hand-drawn pyramid chart + outline characters
gold_examples.prompt: 2D stylized illustration, three light blue polaroid frames laid out side-by-side containing simplified country map outlines, sitting on a notebook ruled-paper background with binder ring holes on the left, flat lighting, mint green and bright red flat palette, thick black outlines --no text numbers (leave empty for code), 3D shadows, realistic paper
gold_examples.negative_prompt: text numbers (leave empty for code), 3D shadows, realistic paper

gold_examples.name: outline_flat_character_scene
gold_examples.description: Multi-character outline scene + flat color fills + simple composition
gold_examples.prompt: 2D cartoon illustration, two big-head characters with simplified geometric bodies standing on separate mountain peaks made of gold coins, wide shot, flat solid peach (#F5DCC1) background, flat unshaded lighting, highly saturated bright flat colors (pink, yellow, green) with thick black ink outlines, clean solid fill texture --no gradients, watercolor, photorealism, 3D depth, realistic human proportions
gold_examples.negative_prompt: gradients, watercolor, photorealism, 3D depth, realistic human proportions

gold_examples.name: oversized_symbol_stage
gold_examples.description: Giant red star center stage + small outline characters around (scale contrast)
gold_examples.prompt: 2D cartoon illustration, a massive stylized red star symbol with tiny big-head characters climbing on it, isometric perspective, flat solid mint green (#C8E8D8) background, flat lighting, vibrant solid block colors with consistent black ink outlines, vector crispness --no shading, realistic textures, thin sketchy lines
gold_examples.negative_prompt: shading, realistic textures, thin sketchy lines

gold_examples.name: paired_pyramid_composition
gold_examples.description: Two stacked pyramids (gold + dark) on pink BG — comparison visual
gold_examples.prompt: 2D cartoon illustration, a massive stylized red star symbol with tiny big-head characters climbing on it, isometric perspective, flat solid mint green (#C8E8D8) background, flat lighting, vibrant solid block colors with consistent black ink outlines, vector crispness --no shading, realistic textures, thin sketchy lines
gold_examples.negative_prompt: shading, realistic textures, thin sketchy lines

style_06_ted_sketchy_limited.name: TED-Ed Sketchy Limited Palette
style_06_ted_sketchy_limited.ai_render_principle: Palette GIỚI HẠN GẮT: orange (#E89A6D) + đen + cream (#F5F0E5) — chỉ 3 màu. Nét chì có độ rung (wobble), khung viền đen bao quanh scene.

gold_examples.name: sketchy_close_up_metaphor_object
gold_examples.description: Tight close-up sketchy handshake + limited palette orange+black+cream
gold_examples.prompt: Editorial sketchy illustration, a single character kneeling and sowing seeds in a loose sketched bushy landscape with small clouds, centered composition, solid cream (#F5F0E5) background, flat lighting, strict limited palette of orange (#E89A6D), black ink, and cream only, dry-brush wobble pencil linework texture --no vibrant rainbow colors, saturated fills, thick clean vector lines, 3D
gold_examples.negative_prompt: vibrant rainbow colors, saturated fills, thick clean vector lines, 3D

gold_examples.name: sketchy_landscape_nature_accent
gold_examples.description: Landscape scene + sketchy line art + 1 orange accent element
gold_examples.prompt: Editorial sketchy illustration, a single character kneeling and sowing seeds in a loose sketched bushy landscape with small clouds, centered composition, solid cream (#F5F0E5) background, flat lighting, strict limited palette of orange (#E89A6D), black ink, and cream only, dry-brush wobble pencil linework texture --no vibrant rainbow colors, saturated fills, thick clean vector lines, 3D
gold_examples.negative_prompt: vibrant rainbow colors, saturated fills, thick clean vector lines, 3D

gold_examples.name: sketchy_multi_character_workplace_scene
gold_examples.description: Workplace scene + multiple sketch characters + cream BG
gold_examples.prompt: Editorial sketchy minimal illustration, a scene inside a black-bordered 4:5 rectangle frame showing a sketchy meeting room table with two characters in orange skin, sitting on an outer solid grey (#D8D6D2) background, flat lighting, limited orange/black/grey palette, loose hand-drawn confident linework --no gradients, cut-out photos, big-head characters
gold_examples.negative_prompt: gradients, cut-out photos, big-head characters

gold_examples.name: sketchy_object_as_chart_element
gold_examples.description: Building/object integrated as chart bar — physical metaphor for data
gold_examples.prompt: Editorial sketchy minimal illustration, a scene inside a black-bordered 4:5 rectangle frame showing a sketchy meeting room table with two characters in orange skin, sitting on an outer solid grey (#D8D6D2) background, flat lighting, limited orange/black/grey palette, loose hand-drawn confident linework --no gradients, cut-out photos, big-head characters
gold_examples.negative_prompt: gradients, cut-out photos, big-head characters

style_07_ted_cartoony_watercolor.name: TED-Ed Cartoony Vector Watercolor
style_07_ted_cartoony_watercolor.ai_render_principle: Hai mode song song: (A) Nhân vật VECTOR chân siêu dài + đầu nhỏ trên solid saturated background; (B) Đồ vật lịch sử bôi WATERCOLOR trên giấy graph paper.

gold_examples.name: allegorical_object_economic_metaphor
gold_examples.description: PLY/DEAD scales as visual economic metaphor + watercolor texture
gold_examples.prompt: Cartoony vector illustration, a businessman with exaggerated super long thin legs and a small angular head wearing a 2-color black and white suit, interacting with a giant red chart arrow, solid saturated mustard yellow (#E0AB30) background, flat lighting, flat solid colors with occasional red accent, clean vector finish --no watercolor here, realistic proportions, outlines, 3D
gold_examples.negative_prompt: watercolor here, realistic proportions, outlines, 3D

gold_examples.name: character_riding_market_rise_arrow
gold_examples.description: Character riding red rising arrow + bullish symbolism
gold_examples.prompt: Cartoony vector illustration, a businessman with exaggerated super long thin legs and a small angular head wearing a 2-color black and white suit, interacting with a giant red chart arrow, solid saturated mustard yellow (#E0AB30) background, flat lighting, flat solid colors with occasional red accent, clean vector finish --no watercolor here, realistic proportions, outlines, 3D
gold_examples.negative_prompt: watercolor here, realistic proportions, outlines, 3D

gold_examples.name: character_watercolor_scene
gold_examples.description: Single character cartoony + watercolor BG wash + warm palette
gold_examples.prompt: Historical watercolor illustration, a close-up of a 1745 VOC merchant coin surrounded by smaller coins, centered on a graph paper grid background, soft ambient lighting, sepia and pale peach watercolor wash palette, wet watercolor bleed texture on graph paper --no thick black ink outlines, flat solid vibrant backgrounds, photorealism
gold_examples.negative_prompt: thick black ink outlines, flat solid vibrant backgrounds, photorealism

gold_examples.name: multi_character_historical_narrative_scene
gold_examples.description: Vintage cowboy/historical scene + period costumes + warm sepia
gold_examples.prompt: Historical watercolor illustration, multiple period-costumed cowboy and historical figures arranged in narrative scene composition, centered on a graph paper grid background, soft ambient lighting, warm sepia and aged peach watercolor wash palette, wet watercolor bleed texture, hand-painted feel --no thick black ink outlines, flat solid vibrant backgrounds, modern clothing, photorealism
gold_examples.negative_prompt: thick black ink outlines, flat solid vibrant backgrounds, modern clothing, photorealism

gold_examples.name: stock_ticker_grid_market_display
gold_examples.description: Stock ticker grid: company logos + price + change% + sky blue BG
gold_examples.prompt: Cartoony vector illustration, a clean 3x2 grid of stock ticker cards each showing simplified company logo + abstract price block + minimal change indicator, sky blue (#7EC8E3) solid background, flat lighting, flat solid colors with red/green accents only, clean vector finish, leaving numeric values empty for code overlay --no realistic stock charts, real company logos, 3D depth, watercolor
gold_examples.negative_prompt: realistic stock charts, real company logos, 3D depth, watercolor

gold_examples.name: vintage_historical_artifact_scene
gold_examples.description: Vintage map + artifact + warm aged paper aesthetic
gold_examples.prompt: Historical watercolor illustration, a close-up of a 1745 VOC merchant coin surrounded by smaller coins, centered on a graph paper grid background, soft ambient lighting, sepia and pale peach watercolor wash palette, wet watercolor bleed texture on graph paper --no thick black ink outlines, flat solid vibrant backgrounds, photorealism
gold_examples.negative_prompt: thick black ink outlines, flat solid vibrant backgrounds, photorealism

style_08_ted_photo_collage.name: TED-Ed Photo Collage Editorial
style_08_ted_photo_collage.ai_render_principle: Editorial collage magazine — đầu THẬT ghép thân vector + giấy crumpled. Drop shadow nhẹ cho cutout. Màu infographic đậm (navy + magenta/teal accent).

gold_examples.name: anthropomorphic_government_metaphor
gold_examples.description: White House/Capitol building with limbs — anthropomorphized government
gold_examples.prompt: Editorial collage cut-out animation style, a photorealistic cut-out head of a CEO attached to an illustrated flat vector body suit sitting in an office chair, leaving negative space for ripped paper labels, solid navy blue (#1E3A6F) paper texture background, flat lighting with light drop shadows on the cutout, natural photo colors mixed with bold magenta/teal, crumpled paper grain --no fully realistic human bodies, fully 3D scenes, clean digital backgrounds
gold_examples.negative_prompt: fully realistic human bodies, fully 3D scenes, clean digital backgrounds

gold_examples.name: concept_map_multi_label_assembly
gold_examples.description: Multi-label concept map + cut-out photos + connection lines
gold_examples.prompt: Editorial magazine collage, physical cut-out props of scissors and stacks of real cash, laid out on a cream paper texture canvas leaving space for digital bar charts, top-down diagrammatic framing, flat lighting with slight physical drop shadows, natural green cash with off-white background, ripped masking tape edges --no 3D rendered money, clean minimal vectors
gold_examples.negative_prompt: 3D rendered money, clean minimal vectors

gold_examples.name: geographic_case_study_collage
gold_examples.description: Country/region collage + palm trees + photo cutouts + label
gold_examples.prompt: Editorial magazine collage, photorealistic cut-out palm trees and tropical houses against a solid tropical teal paper texture background, ripped paper edges around each cutout, leaving negative space for country label tape, flat lighting with subtle physical drop shadows, natural photo colors with bold infographic accent, crumpled paper grain --no fully realistic scenes, smooth digital photo composites, 3D
gold_examples.negative_prompt: fully realistic scenes, smooth digital photo composites, 3D

gold_examples.name: photo_chart_overlay_data_viz
gold_examples.description: Photo collage BG + colored bar chart overlay + dual data
gold_examples.prompt: Editorial magazine collage, physical cut-out props of scissors and stacks of real cash, laid out on a cream paper texture canvas leaving space for digital bar charts, top-down diagrammatic framing, flat lighting with slight physical drop shadows, natural green cash with off-white background, ripped masking tape edges --no 3D rendered money, clean minimal vectors

gold_examples.name: photo_collage_metaphor_centerpiece
gold_examples.description: Central metaphor object + supporting photo cutouts + paper texture
gold_examples.prompt: Editorial collage centerpiece, a single large photorealistic cut-out metaphor object (gold honeycomb, stack of bills, or wheat bundle) centered on a crumpled cream paper background with small ripped supporting photo cutouts arranged around it, flat overhead lighting with subtle drop shadows, warm cream and golden palette with one bold infographic color accent, tactile paper texture --no smooth digital compositing, 3D, vector illustrations

gold_examples.name: political_figure_action_scene
gold_examples.description: Political figure photo + action scene + collage cutouts + crumpled paper
gold_examples.prompt: Editorial collage cut-out animation style, a photorealistic cut-out head of a CEO attached to an illustrated flat vector body suit sitting in an office chair, leaving negative space for ripped paper labels, solid navy blue (#1E3A6F) paper texture background, flat lighting with light drop shadows on the cutout, natural photo colors mixed with bold magenta/teal, crumpled paper grain --no fully realistic human bodies, fully 3D scenes, clean digital backgrounds

gold_examples.name: poverty_case_study_collage
gold_examples.description: Houses/poverty imagery collage + factual statistic overlay
gold_examples.prompt: Editorial magazine collage, photorealistic cut-out houses and modest building photos against a faded grey paper texture background, ripped paper edges, leaving negative space for statistical bar overlay, flat lighting with slight drop shadows, muted natural photo colors with one stark red statistic accent, crumpled paper grain --no smooth digital, 3D rendering, glossy finish

style_09_host_journalist_harris.name: Host Journalist (Johnny Harris)
style_09_host_journalist_harris.ai_render_principle: Cinematic teal-orange Hollywood color. Documentary host in warm cluttered environments. Investigative network diagrams on dark teal basemaps. Vintage archival framed.

gold_examples.name: host_at_home_set_medium
gold_examples.description: Home office set + bookshelf + soft warm light + medium-shot host
gold_examples.prompt: Cinematic documentary photography, a cluttered warm home office with a leather sofa, vintage globe lamp, and bookshelves, slightly out of focus background leaving space for a host, dramatic warm tungsten lighting with cool teal shadows, teal-orange Hollywood color palette, 50mm shallow depth of field --no bright clean white studios, flat lighting
gold_examples.negative_prompt: bright clean white studios, flat lighting

gold_examples.name: host_close_up_dialog
gold_examples.description: Close-up host face + studio bokeh BG + cinematic shallow DoF
gold_examples.prompt: Cinematic documentary photography, a cluttered warm home office with a leather sofa, vintage globe lamp, and bookshelves, slightly out of focus background leaving space for a host, dramatic warm tungsten lighting with cool teal shadows, teal-orange Hollywood color palette, 50mm shallow depth of field --no bright clean white studios, flat lighting

gold_examples.name: animated_geographic_map_actor_icons

gold_examples.prompt: Investigative network diagram aesthetic, a dark nighttime world map base leaving space for octagonal photo badges and dashed arrows, flat UI environment, soft glow lighting, dark teal (#0A1A24) and noir palette with subtle glowing outlines, digital OpenStreetMap subtle basemap texture --no bright colorful Google maps, 3D terrain, cartoon elements

gold_examples.name: money_flow_connection_map
gold_examples.description: Money flow lines connecting countries/entities + flag pins + arrows
gold_examples.prompt: Investigative network diagram aesthetic, a dark nighttime world map base leaving space for octagonal photo badges and dashed arrows, flat UI environment, soft glow lighting, dark teal (#0A1A24) and noir palette with subtle glowing outlines, digital OpenStreetMap subtle basemap texture --no bright colorful Google maps, 3D terrain, cartoon elements

gold_examples.name: zoom_remote_expert_interview
gold_examples.description: Remote expert via Zoom + name caption + bookshelf BG
gold_examples.prompt: Documentary Zoom-call style portrait, a remote expert in a casual home setting with bookshelves behind them, slightly tilted webcam angle, leaving lower third empty for name caption + title, soft natural daylight, warm tungsten ambient with cool desktop monitor glow accent, muted documentary color palette, subtle digital compression aesthetic --no professional studio setup, dramatic cinematic lighting, polished broadcast look
gold_examples.negative_prompt: professional studio setup, dramatic cinematic lighting, polished broadcast look

gold_examples.name: mixed_media_collage_illustration
gold_examples.description: Mixed media: photo + illustration + handdrawn elements layered
gold_examples.prompt: Vintage 19th-century anatomical etching, a highly detailed line drawing of a human heart with the left ventricle highlighted in red, framed in a dark border, soft archival lighting, warm sepia and brown tone palette, old textured parchment paper with scan lines --no flat modern vectors, vivid colors, 3D renders
gold_examples.negative_prompt: flat modern vectors, vivid colors, 3D renders

gold_examples.name: vintage_oil_painting_parallax_world
gold_examples.description: Vintage oil painting world map + parallax depth effect — Tired-specific
gold_examples.prompt: Vintage 19th-century anatomical etching, a highly detailed line drawing of a human heart with the left ventricle highlighted in red, framed in a dark border, soft archival lighting, warm sepia and brown tone palette, old textured parchment paper with scan lines --no flat modern vectors, vivid colors, 3D renders
gold_examples.negative_prompt: flat modern vectors, vivid colors, 3D renders

style_10_host_explainer_second_thought.name: Host Explainer (Second Thought / JT Chapman)
style_10_host_explainer_second_thought.ai_render_principle: Punk-zine + agitprop aesthetic. CRT TV THẬT làm khung archival. Giấy nhám trắng tinh cho typography. Biểu đồ giả lập màn hình CRT (cyan/red + chromatic aberration).

gold_examples.name: host_close_up_dialog_podcast_desk
gold_examples.description: Host JT cream sweater + RØDE NT-USB mic + warm bookshelf home podcast set
gold_examples.prompt: Documentary podcast portrait photography, medium close-up of a male host in a cream sweater seated at a home podcast desk with a visible RØDE NT-USB microphone front and center, warm bookshelf with vintage decor and tan leather couch in soft-focus background, mid-gesture pose, warm tungsten practical lighting, casual home-set aesthetic, shallow depth of field --no broadcast studio backdrop, harsh dramatic key lighting, bright commercial set
gold_examples.negative_prompt: broadcast studio backdrop, harsh dramatic key lighting, bright commercial set

gold_examples.name: bold_typography_title_card
gold_examples.description: Paper-grain BG + bold sans-serif essay-style asymmetric CAPS title
gold_examples.prompt: Zine punk aesthetic background, a completely blank white heavily textured printed paper canvas, leaving 100% space for bold kinetic typography, flat lighting, pure stark white and black palette, heavy paper noise and slight photocopier grain --no gradients, 3D elements, soft colors, clean digital pixels
gold_examples.negative_prompt: gradients, 3D elements, soft colors, clean digital pixels

gold_examples.name: vintage_crt_tv_framed_archival
gold_examples.description: Full Broksonic CRT TV-VCR unit + B&W archival inside CRT screen
gold_examples.prompt: Live-action macro photography, a real retro plastic CRT TV bezel sitting in a dark room, facing straight at the camera, screen is an empty black void for composite, practical low-key lighting, dark grey plastic and pinkish-purple room backlight accent, physical plastic texture --no vector TV frames, flat borders, cartoon shapes
gold_examples.negative_prompt: vector TV frames, flat borders, cartoon shapes

gold_examples.name: annotated_document_red_highlight
gold_examples.description: Academic paper + 2 red marker circles + red arrow + yellow highlights
gold_examples.prompt: Zine punk aesthetic background, a completely blank white heavily textured printed paper canvas, leaving 100% space for bold kinetic typography, flat lighting, pure stark white and black palette, heavy paper noise and slight photocopier grain --no gradients, 3D elements, soft colors, clean digital pixels
gold_examples.negative_prompt: gradients, 3D elements, soft colors, clean digital pixels

gold_examples.name: news_clip_chyron
gold_examples.description: Cable news chyron + headline + body excerpt + pink highlight
gold_examples.prompt: Cable news broadcast composite, a blurred debate-stage or press-room backdrop with leaving space for network logo + headline chyron + lower-third byline + body excerpt text overlay, flat broadcast lighting, generic news studio teal/blue palette with pink/red highlight bar accent zone, subtle broadcast compression texture --no clean minimalist UI, vector graphics, isolated white background
gold_examples.negative_prompt: clean minimalist UI, vector graphics, isolated white background

gold_examples.name: geographic_map_country_labels
gold_examples.description: Tilted satellite basemap + red country overlay + explosion-bloom markers
gold_examples.prompt: Macro photography, extreme close-up of a real physical printed Rand McNally road map resting on a desk, a yellow physical push pin stuck into the paper casting a shadow, shallow depth of field focusing on the pin, practical overhead lighting, faded printed CMYK paper colors, tangible paper fiber texture --no digital flat maps, glowing neon, clean vectors
gold_examples.negative_prompt: digital flat maps, glowing neon, clean vectors

gold_examples.name: host_studio_anchor_desk_branded
gold_examples.description: Branded broadcast studio + hexagonal copper fixtures + purple BG glow
gold_examples.prompt: Branded broadcast studio portrait photography, host in white linen shirt seated at an anchor desk with papers visible (no microphone), hexagonal copper fixtures lining the wall, plants flanking the set, purple BG glow accent, polished broadcast lighting setup, modern news-studio aesthetic, medium depth of field --no casual home podcast setup, dim warm tungsten only, visible microphone, cluttered bookshelves
gold_examples.negative_prompt: casual home podcast setup, dim warm tungsten only, visible microphone, cluttered bookshelves

gold_examples.name: data_chart_overlay
gold_examples.description: Multi-series chart + chromatic aberration retro-tech treatment + dual axes
gold_examples.prompt: Retro CRT data terminal aesthetic, a blank dark screen with horizontal scan lines and RGB chromatic aberration, leaving room for cyan and red data bars, flat digital environment, glowing screen lighting, pure black background with cyan/red accents, pixelated monitor texture --no clean modern minimal charts, white backgrounds, 3D pie charts
gold_examples.negative_prompt: clean modern minimal charts, white backgrounds, 3D pie charts
